title: TerraDiT-Ω: Unified Spatial Control for Satellite Image Synthesis with Any Geospatial Primitive
innovation_summary: TerraDiT-Ω: Unified Spatial Control for Satellite Image Synthesis with Any Geospatial Primitive: We introduce TerraDiT-Ω, a unified spatial control framework that generates satellite imagery directly from any native geospatial primitive.
